event_comments:
Official Result Time vs Your Recorded Result Time: courses 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9 crossed Juanita Drive twice at a controlled crossing, with controls on both sides of the road. To compensate for potential wait times, these two legs were removed from your elapsed time.
Your split times shown on WinSplits, Attackpoint, Livelox, and RouteGadget will include these two legs, as these services cannot correctly report split times with missing legs.
Did you accidentally pick up a navy Helly Hanson rain jacket from the clothing return? If so, please contact info@cascadeoc.org so it can be returned to its owner.
Team results coming!
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
